hero.title: Support Our Students
hero.subtitle: Help us create amazing experiences for our students. Every contribution — big or small — makes a difference.
paypal.title: PayPal
paypal.body: Choose any donation amount. Quick, secure, and goes directly to our school programs.
givebacks.title: Givebacks
givebacks.body: Join the PTA through Givebacks — choose a membership level that fits you as a parent, teacher, or community supporter.
cash.title: Cash
cash.body: Prefer in person? Hand your donation to your child's teacher or any PTA board member. Every dollar goes toward our school community.
cash.note: No link needed — just show up!
notice.body: PS5 PTA is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization — your donation is tax-deductible. EIN: 46-1009361.
where.heading: Where Your Money Goes
where.body: Every dollar supports programs directly benefiting PS5 students — theater, dance, assemblies, multicultural celebrations, school improvements, carnivals, awards, after-school enrichment, and family support.
